content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/create-storage-system/header.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 26
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-text-align-right]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-text-align-right' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-u-text-align-right' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-text-align-right pf-v5-u-mr-xl

Code context:
```
   25              component={TextVariants.small}
   26              className="pf-v5-u-text-align-right pf-v5-u-mr-xl"
   27            >

```

### Fix 2
Line: 26
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-u-text-align-right]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-text-align-right' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-u-text-align-right' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-text-align-right pf-v5-u-mr-xl

Code context:
```
   25              component={TextVariants.small}
   26              className="pf-v5-u-text-align-right pf-v5-u-mr-xl"
   27            >

```

### Fix 3
Line: 4
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-text-text-d-ts-textvariants-removed]:
Type-alias 'TextVariants' was removed (type-alias): Exported enum `TextVariants` was removed — migrate to `ContentVariants`.
  Matching props (use on `ContentVariants` instead): a, blockquote, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p, pre, small

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Text/Text.d.ts
Before: enum: TextVariants

Incident context:
  importedName: TextVariants
  localName: TextVariants
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
From: TextVariants
To: ContentVariants
Replacement: ContentVariants
Member mappings:
  h2 -> h2
  h4 -> h4
  h6 -> h6
  small -> small
  blockquote -> blockquote
  pre -> pre
  a -> a
  h5 -> h5
  h1 -> h1
  p -> p
  h3 -> h3

Code context:
```
    3  import { Trans } from 'react-i18next';
    4  import { TextVariants, Text, TextContent } from '@patternfly/react-core';
    5  import { WizardState } from './reducer';

```

### Fix 4
Line: 4
Rule [semver-text-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <Text> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - Text.ouiaId  →  Content.ouiaId
  - Text.component  →  Content.component
  - Text.className  →  Content.className
  - Text.ouiaSafe  →  Content.ouiaSafe
  - Text.children  →  Content.children
  - Text.isVisitedLink  →  Content.isVisitedLink

Remove <Text> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove Text from the import statement.

Incident context:
  importedName: Text
  localName: Text
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```
    3  import { Trans } from 'react-i18next';
    4  import { TextVariants, Text, TextContent } from '@patternfly/react-core';
    5  import { WizardState } from './reducer';

```

### Fix 5
Line: 4
Rule [semver-textcontent-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <TextContent> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - TextContent.className  →  Content.className
  - TextContent.children  →  Content.children
  - TextContent.isVisited  →  Content.isVisitedLink (renamed)

Remove <TextContent> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove TextContent from the import statement.

Incident context:
  importedName: TextContent
  localName: TextContent
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```
    3  import { Trans } from 'react-i18next';
    4  import { TextVariants, Text, TextContent } from '@patternfly/react-core';
    5  import { WizardState } from './reducer';

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/create-storage-system/header.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze the file and plan all fixes:

**Current state observations:**
- Line 4: Imports `TextVariants, Text, TextContent` from `@patternfly/react-core`
- Line 26: Has `className="pf-v5-u-text-align-right pf-v6-u-mr-xl"` (note: `pf-v5-u-mr-xl` was already partially migrated to `pf-v6-u-mr-xl` in a previous pass)
- Lines 16-36: Uses `<TextContent>`, `<Text>`, and `TextVariants`

**Fix 1 & 2 (CSS class removal):** `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` must be removed — it has no v6 equivalent. I'll replace it with inline style `textAlign: 'right'` to preserve the behavior.

**Fix 3 (TextVariants → ContentVariants):** Replace `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants` in import and all usages. The member mappings show `h1→h1`, `small→small` — same names.

**Fix 4 (Text → Content):** Replace `<Text>` with `<Content>`. The `component` and `className` props map directly.

**Fix 5 (TextContent → Content):** Replace `<TextContent>` with `<Content>`. But since `<Text>` is also being replaced with `<Content>`, I need to handle the nesting. In PF v6, `<Content>` replaces both `<TextContent>` (the wrapper) and `<Text>` (the inline element). The `<Text component={TextVariants.h1}>` becomes `<Content component="h1">`, and `<TextContent>` wrapper becomes `<Content>`.

Wait — in PF v6, `Content` serves as both the wrapper and the text element. The pattern is:
- `<TextContent>` → `<Content>` (wrapper)
- `<Text component={TextVariants.h1}>` → `<Content component="h1">` (inline)

So we can keep the nesting: outer `<Content>` replaces `<TextContent>`, inner `<Content component={ContentVariants.h1}>` replaces `<Text component={TextVariants.h1}>`.

Let me write the fixed file:

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-text-align-right` | ✅ Applied | Removed `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` from className (no v6 equivalent). Added `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` to preserve the right-alignment behavior. |
| Fix 2 | `semver-css-class-removed-u-text-align-right` | ✅ Applied | Same change as Fix 1 — both rules target the same class on the same line. |
| Fix 3 | `semver-...-textvariants-removed` | ✅ Applied | Replaced `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` in import (line 4) and all three usages (lines 17, 18, 25). Member names (`h1`, `small`) are identical between old and new enums. |
| Fix 4 | `semver-text-component-import-deprecated` | ✅ Applied | Replaced `Text` → `Content` in import and all JSX usages (3 opening tags, 3 closing tags). Props `component` and `className` map directly. |
| Fix 5 | `semver-textcontent-component-import-deprecated` | ✅ Applied | Replaced `<TextContent>` → `<Content>` (wrapper element, lines 16/36). Removed `TextContent` from import. No `isVisited` prop was used, so no rename needed. |

**Import cleanup:** The import changed from `{ TextVariants, Text, TextContent }` to `{ ContentVariants, Content }` — all three old symbols were replaced, and only two new symbols are needed (`Content` serves as both the wrapper and the text element in PF v6).

|-----|------|--------|---------|

| Fix 2 | `semver-css-class-removed-u-text-align-right` | ✅ Applied | Same change as Fix 1 — both rules target the same class on the same line. |
| Fix 3 | `semver-...-textvariants-removed` | ✅ Applied | Replaced `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` in import (line 4) and all three usages (lines 17, 18, 25). Member names (`h1`, `small`) are identical between old and new enums. |
| Fix 4 | `semver-text-component-import-deprecated` | ✅ Applied | Replaced `Text` → `Content` in import and all JSX usages (3 opening tags, 3 closing tags). Props `component` and `className` map directly. |
| Fix 5 | `semver-textcontent-component-import-deprecated` | ✅ Applied | Replaced `<TextContent>` → `<Content>` (wrapper element, lines 16/36). Removed `TextContent` from import. No `isVisited` prop was used, so no rename needed. |

**Import cleanup:** The import changed from `{ TextVariants, Text, TextContent }` to `{ ContentVariants, Content }` — all three old symbols were replaced, and only two new symbols are needed (`Content` serves as both the wrapper and the text element in PF v6).
